title: Epic Structures: Villages
description: This mod completely replaces and overhauls Minecraft villages with sprawling cities and towns based on medieval architecture.
body: --- ![About](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3ff71a516d33860bd8a20c9bd813511828e386f8.jpeg) This mod completely replaces and overhauls minecraft villages with sprawling cities and towns based on medieval architecture. All built using vanilla features only, meaning no custom blocks or entities included. (FEEL FREE TO ADD TO ANY MODPACK)  🔔THIS MOD MIGHT CAUSE SEVERE LAG WHEN EXPLORING THE VILLAGES🔔 Recommended mods to help with lag: Enhanced Block Entities ImmediatelyFast Sodium Entity Culling FerriteCore Chunky --- ![News](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8358365976066e665f97bc4c278144372634f1dc.jpeg) **Recent Changes:** 1.21.11 support Improved spawning Compatiblity with mods that add structures to villages -- 🆕 3 out of 5 vanilla villages are complete: ✅ Plains Village ✅ Taiga Village ✅ Snowy Village 🟧 Savanna Village 🟧 Desert Village --- ![Future](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a1a01ad59534c63dba590aaa23a2e2a56e38f11.jpeg) LIST OF MODS THAT ARE WORK IN PROGRESS: ✅ Epic Villages ✅ Epic Witch huts ✅ Epic Dungeons ✅ Epic Igloos 🟨 Epic Jungle Temples --- ![compatibility](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e26543443bf452e61e009408a57fd1e85b999f92.jpeg) - ✅ Fully compatible with **Terralith** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Regions Unexplored** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Tectonic** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Oh the Biomes We've Gone** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Biomes O' Plenty** - ✅ Fully compatible with **Geophilic** - ✅ Fully compatible with **William Wythers’ Overhauled Overworld ** - ✅ Fully compatible with **William Wythers’ Expanded Ecosphere** - ✅ Fully compatible with **ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village** - 💠 Only compatible with **Guard Villagers** on version 1.21+  - 💠 Only compatible with **Waystones** on version 1.21+ - 🚧 Might cause issues when used with other Village mods  --- [![Join the Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/370b72768ac048862cb8fb192e72d2d9440864e9.jpeg)](https://discord.gg/T4xFVm8kct) [![Support us on Kofi](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ad411dc836beeeb4960d34dc09869d7e82d03f9_0.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/atii1)
